title: Then Kizhakku Cheemayile Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile
stanzas: <div>Then Kizhakku Cheemayile Lyrics Kizhakku Cheemayile

Then kizhakku cheemaiyila
sengaathu boomiyila
yezha patta saathikoru
eeram irukku.

Kaayapattaa sondhathukku
kanneer vittaa
saayam pola vazhkaiyilum
saaram irukku.

ivuga pozhappukku
neer vaakkathaan
eesaani moolaiyila
megam irukku.

seer kondu vandhum
paer kettu ponaa
sollaama thukkapadum
sondham pandhame

kuththam thaan paathaa
ooril suththamillaiye
kozhikku kunjumela
kovam vallaye
unpola annan indha
ooril illaiye

Sengaatu mannum
nam veettu ponnum
kaivittu pogak kandaa
kanneer varume

thangachi kannil
kaneerak kanda
thanmaanam kooda
anna vittu tharume

bandhantha meeripoga
sakthi illaiye
paasatha pangupoda
pattaa illaiye

vaerukku ilagi pochu
vettu paaraiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of nostalgia and the beauty of life, reflecting on emotional experiences.

In which movie is this song featured?

Then Kizhakku Cheemayile is featured in the movie Kizhakku Cheemayile.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by K.S. Chithra and Malaysia Vasudevan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

This song was released on November 13, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Then Kizhakku Cheemayile, the song encapsulates a sense of longing and reflection, resonating deeply with listeners. The lyrics poetically describe the beauty and complexities of life, evoking a nostalgic mood. This melody serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in the film, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. With its soothing composition, it invites listeners to immerse themselves in their own memories and feelings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Then Kizhakku Cheemayile is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chithra and Malaysia Vasudevan, this song beautifully showcases A.R. Rahman's early musical genius. Dive into the soothing vibes of Kizhakku Cheemayile and let the emotions wash over you.
stanzaMeanings: In the southern part of the world, there is a unique essence that has risen from the earth.
In life, there is a meaning like the help that comes when you shed tears for your own.
For this place, water is the word of comfort; there is a cloud at the root of the goddess.
In the southern part of the world, there is a unique essence that has risen from the earth.
In life, there is a meaning like the help that comes when you shed tears for your own.
The great mother of the house and the maternal uncle's wealth brings happiness to the girl.
When they come with gifts, if they ask for names, it will lead to a bond that is hard to break.
If there is a problem, there is no purity in the town; like you, brother, there is no one in this place.

When the earth and the home are lost, tears will come to the eyes when you see it.
The younger sister will also give the respect she sees in her eyes.
There is no strength to break the bond; there is no song to sing in love.
The house has become empty; look at the roof.
